title: lepidium campestre
intro: Lepidium campestre, also known as field cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is a perennial plant with a long history of use in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium campestre include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Lepidium campestre can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
